item.name: Sea Nettle
item.description:
Not the most welcome of catches, as it tends to deliver a nasty sting to those whose hands wander too close.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Veteran seafarers all recall the first time they mistook the golden bell of this jellyfish for jettisoned plunder, and getting stung by one is a rite of passage for many. Luckily the poison is a mere annoyance, causing an itch that persists for days, but nothing more.
